caption: A man with a shaved head, a beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio with dark grey acoustic foam panels on the walls. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a silver condenser microphone mounted on a swivel arm. As the scene progresses, the man looks toward the left while speaking into the microphone. He keeps his right arm raised, with his hand curled near the top of the frame. His facial expressions shift from a slight smile to a look of surprise with an open mouth, before returning to a more neutral expression. The microphone and background remain static throughout the sequence, while only the man's mouth and facial features move to convey his reaction.
